positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial animal composition featuring a majestic crescent moon wolf and constellation elements. The wolf should have a clean, graphic silhouette against a deep indigo background, incorporating ethereal nebula swirls and glowing gold line work that form recognizable zodiac symbols. The composition must be central, symmetrical, and highly contrasting, suitable for a wearable art print. Use a limited color palette of indigo, deep teal, midnight blue, and metallic gold. Art style should be elegant, modern cosmic boho, reminiscent of scientific diagram meets spiritual astrology tattoo flash. Lighting should be dramatic, emanating from the gold lines and moon glow. High detail, clean vector quality, perfect for screen printing.
